name: Cross-Plugin Ecosystem Validation
description: Verify all PopKit plugins work together without conflicts

test_cases.name: No duplicate command names across plugins

assertions.description: Command names must be unique across all PopKit plugins

test_cases.name: No duplicate skill names across plugins

assertions.description: Skill names must be unique across all PopKit plugins

test_cases.name: No duplicate agent names across plugins

assertions.description: Agent names must be unique across all PopKit plugins
All plugins must use valid semantic versioning
Plugin versions should be compatible within major version
All plugins should use same version of shared-py
Plugins should not depend on each other

test_cases.name: Total agent count matches expected distribution

assertions.description: Agent counts should match expected distribution
Total agents across all plugins should be 23

notes: This test validates the entire PopKit plugin ecosystem
All plugins must coexist without naming conflicts
Plugins are independent but share common utilities
Agent distribution is documented and enforced
